Time spent at the Exploratorium was rated by our 10-year-old granddaughter as the best part of our time in San Francisco. She spent two hours fully engrossed in the hands-on exhibits at the museum, and wished we had more time to spend there. The exhibits are varied enough to interest kids of different ages.
My 7 year old granddaughter and I spent 3 hours exploring all the hands on exhibits. She loved it all! Well presented and organized and loved everything about it
